source_organization: California Department of Resources Recycling and Recovery; U.S. Environmental Protection Agency
notes: Landfill share is proxied as one minus the California food-waste collection-rate reference, while the landfill emission factor remains the EPA WARM controlled-landfill proxy.

source_organization: California Department of Resources Recycling and Recovery; U.S. Environmental Protection Agency
notes: Composting share is allocated from the collected-food-waste portion using the active California SWIS food-waste facility technology mix.

source_organization: California Department of Resources Recycling and Recovery; U.S. Environmental Protection Agency
notes: Anaerobic-digestion share is allocated from the collected-food-waste portion using the active California SWIS food-waste facility technology mix. The WARM digestion summary factor is used because SWIS does not consistently distinguish wet vs dry digestion subtype.

source_organization: California Department of Resources Recycling and Recovery; U.S. Environmental Protection Agency
notes: California-weighted baseline for food-waste management. Disposal share comes from the current California collection-rate proxy; collected-food-waste treatment shares come from active SWIS food-waste facility technology mix; pathway factors come from EPA WARM.
